result:
I'm hitting permission prompts on every tool call -- the session sandbox has no auto-allow rules configured. Before I can create the branch and PR, I need a few commands approved. Here's exactly what I need to run:

**Step 1 -- create the branch:**
```
git switch -c claude/daily-report-2026-06-28
```

**Step 2 -- write the report file** (no shell needed, I can use the Write tool once branch is created)

**Step 3 -- commit + push + open draft PR:**
```
git add docs/DAILY-REPORT-2026-06-28.md
git commit -m "chore: daily change report 2026-06-28"
git push -u origin claude/daily-report-2026-06-28
gh pr create --draft --title "Daily report: 2026-06-28" --body "..."
```

Could you approve these in the permission dialogs as they appear? Alternatively, if you want to unblock this class of `git` and `gh` commands permanently for this session, I can run `/update-config` to add them to your allowlist first.

---

**Summary of what changed in the last 24h** (ready now, regardless of PR status):

---

### `otchealth-claude-tools` -- changes since 2026-06-27

**One commit:** `74f948f` (Sat Jun 27 15:52:55 PDT 2026)

**Subject:** `fix(m365-mail): use least-priv graph-mail-ro app (SM self-hydrate) + curl transport`

**What changed and why (`skills/m365-mail/m365-mail.mjs`):**

| Problem | Fix |
|---|---|
| Admin app token (~20 KB) was rejected by the Hyperagent egress proxy | Switch credential resolution to prefer the new `graph-mail-ro-*` SM secrets (least-priv app, small token) with a graceful fallback chain: env vars → `graph-mail-ro-*` SM → `graph-mail-*` SM |
| `fetch`/`undici` can't reach `graph.microsoft.com` through the Hyperagent proxy (returns HTML) | All Graph data calls now go through `curl` (only the OAuth token call stays on `fetch`, since `login.microsoftonline.com` is reachable) |
| Creds unavailable when `GCP_CLAUDE_DRIVER_SA_JSON` isn't in env | Script self-hydrates by loading the claude-driver SA from disk (`~/.gcp_claude_driver_sa.json` / `/agent/.gcp_claude_driver_sa.json`) and calling Secret Manager directly |

**Scope:** 518 files, 54,708 insertions -- this was the repo's initial commit, so the entire toolkit landed alongside the mail fix.

---

Please approve the git/gh commands and I'll write the report file and open the draft PR.

tool_input.description: Create daily report branch from main

tool_input.command: git branch claude/daily-report-2026-06-28 && git checkout claude/daily-report-2026-06-28
tool_input.description: Create and switch to daily report branch
Create and switch to report branch

tool_input.command: cat ~/.claude/settings.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get('permissions',{}), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null | head -50
